task_completion.description: Configure store name, phone, and hours
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento 'Store Information' settings page. Verify that 'Store Name' is set to 'Terra & Clay Studio', 'Store Phone Number' is '(505) 555-0142', and 'Store Hours of Operation' is 'Mon-Fri 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM'.

In the 'Store Information' settings, verify the address fields: Country is 'United States', Region/State is 'New Mexico', ZIP/Postal Code is '87501', City is 'Santa Fe', and Street Address is '214 Canyon Road'.

task_completion.description: Configure store email addresses and sender names
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento 'Store Email Addresses' settings. Verify General Contact has Sender Name 'Terra & Clay Studio' and Email 'hello@terraandclay.com'. Verify Sales Representative has Sender Name 'Terra & Clay Orders' and Email 'orders@terraandclay.com'. Verify Customer Support has Sender Name 'Terra & Clay Support' and Email 'support@terraandclay.com'.

task_completion.description: Configure HTML Head Default Title and Meta Description
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento 'Design' configuration page under the 'HTML Head' section. Verify 'Default Title' is 'Terra & Clay Studio | Handcrafted Pottery & Ceramics' and 'Default Description' matches the specified meta description starting with 'Discover handcrafted pottery...'.

task_completion.description: Configure Header Welcome Text and Footer Copyright
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento 'Design' configuration page, under the 'Header' section, verify 'Welcome Text' is 'Welcome to Terra & Clay Studio — Handcrafted with love in Santa Fe'. Under the 'Footer' section, verify 'Copyright' is 'Copyright © 2025 Terra & Clay Studio. All rights reserved.'.
Look for a green success message banner at the top of the Magento admin panel stating 'You saved the configuration.' after the settings have been applied.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Magento Admin GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Magento Admin panel interface (navigation menu on the left, configuration forms in the center) rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs must be entered into the actual Magento configuration input fields, not typed into a generic text editor, notepad, or dummy HTML page.

integrity.description: The save action and success message appear genuine
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save Config' button should be clicked within the Magento interface, and the resulting success message should appear in the standard Magento notification area without signs of DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified task details: Store Name is 'Terra & Clay Studio'. Phone is '(505) 555-0142' (505 is a real NM area code). Address is 214 Canyon Road, Santa Fe, NM 87501 (Santa Fe and 87501 are real, Canyon Road is a real street). Emails are hello@terraandclay.com (General), orders@terraandclay.com (Sales), and support@terraandclay.com (Support).
